rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 27, 2017, line 1. rulings.Case Title: DAVID MANN VS. MONTY BRACHA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 27, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT MONTY BRACHA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Demurrer is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to add, Hamo, a necessary party to this action. Plaintiff's opposition is devoid of any authority for the proposition that Haro is not a necessary party to this action. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Motion to Stike request for punitive damages is denied. Allegations are sufficient. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAMELA PICCININI VS. MARK ZUFFO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 27, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANTs MARK ZUFFO, JOHN ZUFFO, ERNESTINE ZUFFO's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently supported by factual allegations. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAI-MAI QUON HO VS. JAMESON TELCH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 27, 2017, line 6. PLAINTIFF MAI-MAI HO's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production to be provided within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,035 to be paid no later than May 8, 2017. = (501/REQ)
